profilePage.title: Profile

notConfigured.title: Profile not configured
notConfigured.description: To view your MMR and stats, configure your platform and username in Settings. Then click 'Connect' to load your data.

profilePage.refreshErrorFallback: Try again in a few minutes.

title: Player Profiles
description: Each profile has its own match history and settings.
noProfiles: No profiles yet. Create one to get started.

errors.duplicateName: A profile with that name already exists.

create.title: Create new profile
create.description: Each profile has its own match history and settings.

delete.title: Delete profile
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the profile "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
delete.warning: All matches and statistics associated with this profile will be lost.

switch.title: Switch profile
switch.description: You are about to switch to the "{{name}}" profile. The app will restart to load the new profile's data.

rename.title: Rename profile
rename.description: Enter a new name for this profile.
